library.title: Laebrari
library.subtitle: Lentsoe la hau le merero ea katara, ho tloha mohopolong ho ea ho o lokolla.

no_results.title: Ha ho merero e fumanoeng
no_results.description: Leka ho lokisa sebatli kapa maemo.

empty.title: Laeborari ea hau ha e na letho
empty.description: Qala morero o mocha ho tloha qalong, kapa ho kenya thepa ho nka hore u se u ntse u e-na le disk.

project_dialog.title: Morero o mocha
project_dialog.description: E fane ka lebitso ebe u khetha mokhoa oa ho rekota.

album_dialog.title: Letlapa le lecha
album_dialog.description: Kopanya merero e amanang le eona ho ba albamo.

album.empty: Ha ho na merero ho albamo ena hajoale.
album.delete_confirm_description: Merero e ke ke ea hlakoloa, e tla tlosoa feela ho " {{name}} ".

delete_project.confirm_description: Sena se tlosa morero le ho nka ntho e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe ho eona. Sena se ke ke sa etsolloa.

record.title: Rekota
record.subtitle: Nka setšoantšo se hloekileng, shebella maemo a hau, 'me u latele mongolo.
record.device_empty: Ha ho lisebelisoa tse kentsoeng tse fumanoeng.

guide.title: Seboka se tataisoang
guide.subtitle: Lumella mokoetlisi hore a tsamaee ka har'a script mohato ka mohato, ho tloha ho futhumala ho ea ho poleloana e buuoang.
guide.unavailable: Seshene se hlahiswang ha se so fumanehe ho sebara hajoale.
guide.select_project_device: Khetha projeke le sesebelisoa se kenyang ho hatisa mehato hona mona.
guide.no_record_step: Mohato oa ho futhumatsa - ha ho rekoto e hlokahalang.
guide.complete_body: U rekotile mohato o mong le o mong oa sengoloa. Khutlela ho "Audio tab" ya projeke mme o kgethe tseo o di ratang haholo.

best2min.button: Fumana metsotso e 2 e monate ka ho fetisisa (Suno)
best2min.hint: E etsa tlhahlobo ea matla le ho hlaka ka nako eohle ho fumana fensetere ea eona e matla ea metsotso e 2 - o ntse o ka khona ho lokisa sebaka ka letsoho ka mor'a moo.
best2min.unavailable: Tlhahlobo e ntle ka ho fetisisa ea metsotso e 2 ha e so fumanehe ho seva sena.

record.takes_empty: Ha ho tse rekotiloeng nakong ena.
record.ws_disconnected: E hokela ho level meter hape…
record.select_project_first: Khetha morero oo u batlang ho o qala.

no_takes.title: Ha ho na ho nka
no_takes.description: Rekota faele e ncha kapa u kenye faele e teng.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Audio e tala le mofuta o mong le o mong o sebetsitsoeng li tla tlosoa.

pipeline.title: Ketane ea ho sebetsa
pipeline.preset_save: Boloka joalo ka ha e setiloe esale pele
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: E hloka tlatsetso e sa kengoang

export.title: Export take
export.description: Fana ka faele ea ho qetela ho tsoa ho mofuta o sebetsitsoeng.

notes.placeholder: Lintlha tsa mahala mabapi le projeke ena…

lyrics.placeholder: Ngola mantsoe a mantsoe mona. Sebelisa phalete e lehlakoreng ho kenya Suno meta-tags.
lyrics.versions_empty: Ha ho na liphetolelo tse bolokiloeng hajoale.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Mongolo oa hajoale o tla nkeloa sebaka ke mofuta o bolokiloeng ho {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Tobetsa tag ho e kenya ho khesara.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: E sa netefatsoang - e kanna ea se be le phello ho sephetho.

prompts.preview_empty: Khetha template 'me u tlatse lintho tse fapaneng ho bona ponelo-pele.
prompts.char_count_warning: Mokhoa o khothaletsang litlhaku tse fetang 1000 o ka fokotsoa ke Suno.

stems.title: Lipuo le katara
stems.empty: Sena ha se e-so arohane. Matha karohano ho utloa mantsoe le katara u le mong.
stems.capability_missing: Karohano ea mohloli ha e ea kengoa setsing sena sa marang-rang.
stems.unavailable: Karohano ea lentsoe/katara ha e so fumanehe ho seva sena.

import.title: Kenya
import.subtitle: Tlisa merero e seng e ntse e le teng ka disk ka har'a laeborari.

step1.title: Fumana foldara
step1.description: Supa foldara ea metso ka merero le lipina tsa hau.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg ha e fumanehe - lifaele tse hlokang ho fetoloa li tla tloloa.

step2.title: Hlahloba lintlha
step2.description: Sheba mabitso, maemo, le tse tla romelwa kantle ho naha pele o netefatsa.

step3.title: Kenya
step3.description: Netefatsa ho kopitsa lifaele le ho theha merero.
step3.copy_originals: Kopitsa lifaele tsa mantlha ka har'a laeborari
step3.done_description: Mesebetsi e ka tlase e entsoe laeboraring ea hau.

templates.title: Lithempleite
templates.subtitle: Lithempleite tsa kapele tse ka sebelisoang hape le meta-tag bakeng sa Suno.
templates.delete_confirm_description: Sena se ke ke sa etsolloa.

editor.template_hint: Tšoaea moo mofuta o mong le o mong e leng oa oona 'me lebitso la oona le phuthetsoe ka litšepe tse kobehileng habeli - mohlala, mofuta o mong o bitsoang "mofuta" o fetoha mofuta o phuthetsoeng ka litšepe tse peli tse bulang le tse peli tse koalang.

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Li-tag tsa sebopeho le setaele Suno o lemoha mantsoe a ka hare.

tier_legend.1: Karolo ea 1 - e ngotsoe ebile e tsitsitse
tier_legend.4: Karolo ea 4 - placebo, e sa netefatsoang

metatags.empty: Ha ho na meta-tag e tloaelehileng hajoale.

settings.title: Litlhophiso
settings.subtitle: Lintlha tsa sistimi, puo, le likhetho tsa kamehla.
settings.gpu_none: Ha ho bafani ba GPU ba fumanoeng
settings.lufs_target_hint: E sebelisoa e le tlhahiso ea ho qala ha ho romela kantle ho naha ho nka. Boemo ba kamehla ba Suno bo lutse ho pota -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Tataiso ea ho rekota ea Suno
guide.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho hapa lentsoe le katara o nka hore o fumana litholoana tse ntle.
guide.intro: Suno e sebetsa hantle haholo ka litšupiso tse hloekileng, tse hlakileng. Tataiso ena e akaretsa boitokiso, maemo a rekotiloeng, le mongolo oa metsotso e 3–5 oa ho rekota.

prep.title: Tokisetso
prep.body: Ngola ka kamoreng e tšoaroang kapa e nang le lintho tse ngata tse bonolo (likharetene, limmete, liaparo ka kamoreng). Koala li-fan le eng kapa eng e lumang. Futhumala lentsoe la hau metsotso e 5 pele u rekota.

levels.title: Maemo: -12 ho -6 dBFS
levels.body: Sepheo sa litlhōrō tse pakeng tsa -12 le -6 dBFS metara. Ka tlas'a sebaka seo, lerata le ka morao le bonahala haholoanyane; ka holim'a eona, kotsi ea ho fokotseha ea phahama. Sebelisa metara leqepheng la Record ho beha phaello ea hau pele u qala.

distance.title: Sebaka sa Mic: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Lula 15 ho 30 cm ho tloha microphone. Haufi ho feta moo e feteletsa plosives le proximity effect; hole hole, o nka leetsi le lerata le eketsehileng.

script.title: Mongolo o rekota
script.vowels: Liluma-nosi tse tsitsitseng - a, e, i, o, u
script.scales: Likala tse bonolo, holimo le tlase
script.excerpt: Karolo ea pina (libareng tse 8 ho isa ho tse 16)
script.dynamics: Matla: qala ka bonolo, fella ka lentsoe le phahameng
script.spoken_phrase: Polelo e le 'ngoe e buuoang, hore Suno a tsebe ho bala molumo oa lentsoe la hau

expectations.title: Seo Suno a se lebeletseng
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, e omeletseng (ha ho leetsi kapa litlamorao), metsotso e 3 ho isa ho e 5 ea litšupiso. E hloekileng ka ho fetisisa, e emelang metsotso e 2 ea ho nka hangata e hlahisa litholoana tse ntle ka ho fetisisa.

suno_voice_full.name: Fumana tlhahlobo e feletseng ea lebitso Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Metsotso e 5 e tataisitsoeng: ho futhumatsa, liluma-nosi, likala, mantsoe a qotsitsoeng a lipina tse peli, matla le poleloana e buuoang.

step.warmup_inst: Lokolla ka ho yawns, lip trills (brrr), le hum e bonolo nako e ka etsang motsotso. Ha ho hlokahale hore u rekote - ke feela ho phomola 'metso pele u bina.
step.vowels_inst: Tšoara liluma-nosi ka 'ngoe - a, e, i, o, u - metsotsoana e 3 ho isa ho e 4 ka molumo oa hau o monate, ka molumo o tsitsitseng. Sena se thusa Suno ho utloa molumo oa lentsoe la hau.
step.scales_inst: Opela sekala se bonolo ho ya hodimo le tlase, ho "la" kapa "na". Ha ho hlokahale hore e be e phethahetseng - sepheo ke ho etsa 'mapa oa lentsoe la hau.
step.section_inst: Opela lipina tse 8 ho isa ho tse 16, ka sepheo sa sebele seo u batlang ho se fetisa. Bea pele ho hlaka le ho ba teng ho feta ho phethahala ha tekheniki.
step.section2_inst: Bina li-bar tse ling tse 8 ho isa ho tse 16 - e leng k'horase kapa karolo e fapaneng le e fetileng. Mefuta e fapaneng e thusa mohlala ho ithuta lentsoe la hau.
step.dynamics_inst: Binelang poleloana e tšoanang ho qala ka bonolo haholo le ho qetella ka lentsoe le phahameng, ntle le ho hatella 'metso oa hau. Sena se bonts'a Suno maemo a matla a lentsoe la hau.
step.spoken_inst: Bua - se bine - poleloana e khuts'oane, ea tlhaho, joalo ka ha eka u ntse u qoqa. Sena se thusa Suno ho lemoha molumo oa lentsoe la hau.

errors.network: Ha e khone ho fihla ho seva.
errors.validation_error: Sheba lintlha tseo u li kentseng.
errors.preset_not_found: Setulo esale pele ha se fumanehe.
errors.device_busy: Sesebelisoa sa molumo se sebelisoa ke lenaneo le leng.
errors.device_not_found: Sesebelisoa sa molumo ha se fumanehe.
errors.already_recording: Khatiso e se e ntse e tsoela pele.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg ha e ea kengoa - e kenye ho fetolela faele ena.
errors.disk_full: Ha ho sebaka se lekaneng sa disk.
errors.permission_denied: Tumello e hanetsoe bakeng sa tsela e fanoeng.
errors.import_path_not_found: Tsela ea ho tlisa kantle ha e fumanehe.
errors.record_failed: E hlolehile ho qala ho rekota.
